title: melilotus altissimus var. macrorhizus
intro: Melilotus altissimus var. macrorhizus, also known as sweet clover, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the legume family. The plant contains coumarin, a compound with anticoagulant properties, which has been used to prevent blood clots and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Melilotus altissimus var. macrorhizus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
